title: GNN-RAG: Graph Neural Network Retrieval Augmented Generation

defines.name: GNN-RAG
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework for KGQA that uses a GNN to retrieve answer candidates from a dense KG subgraph and verbalizes shortest reasoning paths for LLM-based answering.

problem: Existing KGQA RAG methods struggle to retrieve the right multi-hop graph information from large, complex knowledge graphs and often require stronger LLMs or extra calls.
